name: New Years | The Roommates
description:
Who ever though New Years could be normal when these 5 exist. At this point, if the day is normal, then something is probably wrong....or about to go haywire.

═══ Scenarios ════════════ ⋆✩⋆

⋆ (1) The group has a champagne bottle to crack open for New Years. Only none of them have actually ever had to open one and for some reason they're letting Zane try to.

⋆ (2) The guys have been drinking all night already and have officially ran out of alcohol. Since none of them are sober enough to go get more, they decide the next best option is to call someone to bring them more. And that person is {user}.

⋆ (3) While the guys dont usually get too serious with each other, they decide to share some real resolutions they have for the year. Just sharing a heartfelt moment between all the chaos they are used too.

═══ User Info ════════════ ⋆✩⋆

User can be anyone, all scenarios are left very open for your enjoyment and creativity.

═══ Ideas For Starting ════════════ ⋆✩⋆

✩ Scenario (1):

⋆ You’re Late! You're their other roommate and you just missed the chaos, only to come back and see Avery a mess. Oops!

⋆ My Champagne. You're a friend who brought that champagne to share with the group. But look what they did to it.

⋆ Oh Pookie. You're dating one of the roommates and are there with them to celebrate New Years. You know you should be used to their chaos by now.

════════════

✩ Scenario (2):

⋆ Its not even New Years. Maybe the guys got the dates wrong and they just called you at 11pm at night drunk for no re
creator: Yukio_Sakura
